Name: Measures should start with an uppercase letter
Description: Measure names must begin with a capital letter for a consistent field list.

Name: Measures should live in a DisplayFolder
Description: Organize measures into DisplayFolders so the field list stays navigable.

Name: Measure has an empty expression
Description: The measure is blank or returns BLANK() directly with no logic.

Name: Avoid IFERROR (masks underlying errors)
Description: IFERROR hides real errors and is slow; prefer DIVIDE() or explicit handling.

Name: Bidirectional relationship
Description: Both-directions cross-filtering hurts the engine and can cause ambiguity; justify each one.

Name: Island table (no relationships)
Description: An imported table with no relationships is usually a modeling mistake (unless it is a disconnected parameter table).
Expression: UsedInRelationships.Count() == 0 and not Name.StartsWith("LocalDateTable_") and not Name.StartsWith("DateTableTemplate_")

Name: Auto date/time tables present
Description: Auto date/time creates hidden LocalDateTable_/DateTableTemplate_ tables that bloat the model. Disable it and use a real Date table.

Name: Table is missing a description
Description: Tables should carry a description for documentation and the data catalog.

Name: Measure is missing a description
Description: Measures should carry a description for documentation and the data catalog.

Name: Key columns should be hidden
Description: Surrogate/foreign key columns ending in ID carry no meaning for end users and should be hidden.
